description: DJConnect spoken music intent examples for the post-STT PTT pipeline.
rules: Explicit media words win over generic phrasing.
Requests with album/plaat are album intents, even when the sentence also contains van/by.
Requests with nummer/liedje/track/song are track intents.
Generic requests such as Speel Nirvana remain artist-first.
Local deterministic parsing can override stale or generic HA Assist results.
HA may use Assist STT correction before intent parsing, but Spotify credentials are never sent to Assist.

nl: Ik heb wel zin in Nirvana
Zet het liedje Black van Pearl Jam op
Draai track Nothing Else Matters van Metallica
Speel artiest Nirvana met nummer Lithium
en: Play the track Black by Pearl Jam
Play artist Nirvana with song Lithium

nl: Speel album Ten van Pearl Jam
Zet de plaat OK Computer van Radiohead op
Draai album Rumours van Fleetwood Mac
en: Play the album Ten by Pearl Jam
Put on album OK Computer by Radiohead
